text.title: NeMo Guardrails Decision Tree
text.summary: Pick rail set by flow complexity and KB presence.

conclusion.verdict: skip NeMo — use Guardrails AI for single-turn

branch.question: Does it ground answers in a knowledge base?

conclusion.verdict: enable check facts + knowledge_base block; flows.output += check facts
enable check jailbreak + check topic on input; self check output
minimum: intents + flows + self check output

example.code: multi_turn=true → q-rag → rag=true → kb-grounded-facts verdict applied
